license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.pthdnj6
title: LVL0 cloning using annealed Oligos
author: Daniel Stukenberg

steps_raw.instruction: Set up Annealing reaction in 1,5 mL microcentrifuge tube %s %s Incubate in heatblock for 10 min at 85°C Turn off heatblock and allow samples to remain in the heatblock for slow cooling to room temperature. Proceed with next step or freeze annealed oligos for long term storage.

Set up Golden Gate Reaction %s %s Entry Vector 50 - 70 ng T7-Ligase (NEB) 1 µL BsmBI (NEB) 1 µL T4-Ligas Buffer 1 µL ddH20 Ad 10 µL Start Golden Gate Reaction in Thermocycler %s %s Digest 42°C 2 min Ligation 16°C 5 min Final Digest 60°C 30 min Inactivation 80°C 19 min
Transform complete reaction mix into competent cells using a chosen protocol
